## Summary

- Describe the motivation and design-system impact.
- List token/component/docs changes clearly.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Checklist

- [ ] English-only documentation and code comments
- [ ] No direct push to `main`
- [ ] Ready for **Squash and merge**
